CustomField.formula: Total_Correct__c - (Total_Wrong__c / IF(OR(ISPICKVAL(Student__r.Grade__c, '9. Sınıf'), ISPICKVAL(Student__r.Grade__c, '10. Sınıf'), ISPICKVAL(Student__r.Grade__c, '11. Sınıf'), ISPICKVAL(Student__r.Grade__c, '12. Sınıf'), ISPICKVAL(Student__r.Grade__c, 'Mezun')), 3, 4))
CustomField.label: Total Net
